name: Macro
description: Execute a saved macro workflow. Inputs and outputs are dynamically created based on the macro's Macro Input and Macro Output nodes.
doc:
Use a saved macro workflow as a reusable component.

Features:
• Dynamic inputs/outputs based on macro definition
• Encapsulates complex logic into single node
• Reuse the same macro across multiple flows

Creating Macros:
1. Mark a flow as 'Macro' in flow settings
2. Add Macro Input nodes for parameters
3. Add Macro Output nodes for results
4. The macro appears in the Macros category

Tip: Macros are great for standardizing common operations like image processing pipelines or API formatting.

properties.name: Macro Name
properties.description: Display name of the selected macro

properties.description: Input port definitions from the macro
